title: IPA Core Training Guide
author: Courtney Comrie
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7dzhi76

steps.title: Speak to Dr
steps.instruction: Speak to Dr. Hutchinson or one of the graduate students about getting access to the linux box. After being added to the linux box access list, go to https://dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.62whgfe for directions on how to enter the linux box through X2Go Client.

steps.title: The lab utilizes softwares that use...
steps.instruction: The lab utilizes softwares that use Linux to be run and called. In order to run many of the image analyis softwares, you must first learn to Linux. Cornell University offers a free and comprehensive virtual workshop for beginners in Linux. Complete the training in the link before moving on: https://cvw.cac.cornell.edu/Linux/

steps.title: Obtain access to the HPC web...
steps.instruction: Obtain access to the HPC web interface through lab account, and follow the "HPC Account Set Up and Access" protocol to get familiar with the interface.

steps.title: With practice data follow protcols Building...
steps.instruction: With practice data follow protcols Building Data Structures, DIFFPREP, DRBUDDI, and DRTAMAS in that order.

steps.title: Note
steps.instruction: Note: In these protocols you will get exposure to other software besides TORTOISE.
